creator: daniel@shafer.cc
text:
Created attachment 208147
nzbhydra2 Makefile.patch

This updates the version to 2.7.2

Changelog can be viewed at:
https://github.com/theotherp/nzbhydra2/blob/master/changelog.md

Changes to port:
- Updated version to 2.7.2
- Updated JAVA_VERSION to 8+ to remove reference to EOL Java versions (bug #241021)
- Changed the static version to ${DISTVERSION}

Review submitted (review D21842)
